scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,vite,next -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix apps/backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard-vite run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard-next run dev"
scripts.dev:default: concurrently -k -n backend,next -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix apps/backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard-next run dev"
scripts.dev:next-stack: concurrently -k -n backend,next -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix apps/backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard-next run dev"
scripts.dev:vite-stack: concurrently -k -n backend,vite -c blue,green "npm --prefix apps/backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/dashboard-vite run dev"
